theoremName: closed LSC nonnegative cone consequence theorem
statement: The closed-LSC nonnegative cone principle supplies the abstract cone-closure consequence needed by the augmented nonnegative closed-form limit theorem.

closedLscNonnegativeConePrincipleStatus.label: closed LSC nonnegative cone principle
closedLscNonnegativeConePrincipleStatus.reason: Imported from the abstract closed-LSC nonnegative cone principle theorem.

closedLscNonnegativeConeConsequenceStatu.label: closed LSC nonnegative cone consequence
closedLscNonnegativeConeConsequenceStatu.reason: A closed lower-semicontinuous envelope of nonnegative core forms remains nonnegative.

proof: Import the abstract closed-LSC nonnegative cone principle.
Extract only the cone-closure consequence used upstream.
